---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error, typo, or incorrect security guidance
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What's wrong?

Describe the issue clearly. Which template or example is affected?

## File and section

- File: (e.g. `templates/pro/DATABASE.md`)
- Section: (e.g. "RLS Policy Patterns")

## What should it say?

Describe the correction or provide the fixed text.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the security or accuracy impact of this issue.
